reviews.comment:
Se rompió mi auto. Me fueron a buscar en Chivilcoy, me llevaron hasta Luján, allí trajeron el auto a casa en beccar y un remis nos trajo hasta casa. Fantástico servicio. Felicitaciones

(Translated by Google)
My car broke down. They picked me up in Chivilcoy, took me to Luján, then brought my car home in Beccar, and a taxi took us home. Fantastic service. Congratulations!
